description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a deep, glossy red finish and a double-cutaway design, allowing easy access to the higher frets. The body is contoured and features chrome hardware, including a bridge, control knobs, and pickups. The neck is long and slender, with a rosewood or similar dark wood fretboard and dot inlays marking the positions. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs, arranged three on each side, and displays a visible logo. The guitar has a set of pickups and a selector switch, indicating its electric nature. The overall construction suggests a robust instrument designed for performance in urban music settings.
description: A glossy red, double-cutaway electric guitar with chrome hardware, a dark fretboard, and a distinctive headstock logo. It features a contoured body, multiple pickups, and six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim profile, contoured body, and the full length of the neck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the double-cutaway body, pickups, control knobs, and the headstock with visible logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the guitar's body contour and neck, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the body and neck, with the headstock and tuning pegs visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side and a visible logo
